name: 15Five
description: Connect to 15Five to sync check-in reports, OKR objectives, high-five recognition, meetings, and team data into Shielva.

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.description: 15Five API key generated from your account settings.

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Sync check-in reports, OKR objectives, and high fives into the knowledge base.

apis.name: List Users
apis.description: Return all 15Five users, paginating through all pages.

apis.name: List Reports
apis.description: Return all 15Five check-in reports, paginating through all pages.

apis.name: List Objectives
apis.description: Return all 15Five OKR objectives, paginating through all pages.

apis.name: List Meetings
apis.description: Return all 15Five 1-on-1 meetings, paginating through all pages.

apis.name: List High Fives
apis.description: Return all 15Five high fives/recognition, paginating through all pages.

apis.name: List Groups
apis.description: Return all 15Five groups/teams, paginating through all pages.
